category_sources: Official repository description identifies Ghidra as a software reverse engineering framework.
source_facts.description says it is a multi-platform software reverse engineering framework.
display_name_sources: Official repository and project branding use Ghidra.
docs_sources: Official Ghidra site at ghidra-sre.org is the project documentation/download surface.
Official GitHub repository README is an official documentation fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/NationalSecurityAgency/ghidra; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official repository description identifies reverse engineering and SRE scope.
source_facts.description says software reverse engineering framework.
